---
title: "CV"
toc: false
---

<h2 class="section-heading">Curriculum Vitae</h2>
<hr class="section-rule">

::: {style="margin-bottom:2rem;"}
Download the full CV as a PDF, or browse publications and talks using the site navigation.

<a href="cv.pdf" style="display:inline-block;margin-top:1rem;font-size:0.875rem;font-weight:500;color:#1a5276;border:1px solid #c5d8e8;padding:0.45rem 1.1rem;border-radius:3px;text-decoration:none;">Download CV (PDF)</a>
:::

---

### Current position

**Professor of Demography** (Professora Adjunta)  
Departamento de Demografia, Faculdade de Ciências Econômicas (FACE)  
Cedeplar, Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais (UFMG)  
Belo Horizonte, Minas Gerais, Brazil

---

### Previous positions

**Research Scientist** (2018–2024)  
Health and Longevity (HELO) Research Group  
Vienna Institute of Demography, Austrian Academy of Sciences (VID/OeAW)  
Wittgenstein Centre for Demography and Global Human Capital (IIASA, OeAW, University of Vienna), Vienna, Austria

---

### Education

**PhD in Demography** (2017)  
Cedeplar/FACE, Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais  
*Vanguards of Longevity: The case of Brazilian Air Force military*  
Supervisor: Prof. Cássio Maldonado Turra

**MSc in Demography** (2014)  
Cedeplar/FACE, Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais  
*Mortality levels among Brazilian Air Force Officers*

**BSc in Social Sciences** (2010), minor in Philosophy  
FAFICH, Universidade Federal de Minas Gerais

---

### Selected grants & affiliations

- Editor, [Vienna Yearbook of Population Research (VYPR)](https://www.oeaw.ac.at/vid/publications/serial-publications/vienna-yearbook-of-population-research)
- ERC project: *Levels and Trends of Health Expectancy: Understanding its Measurement and Estimation Sensitivity* (VID/OeAW, 2018–2024)
- CNPq research productivity grant

---

### Links

- [Lattes CV](https://buscatextual.cnpq.br/buscatextual/visualizacv.do?id=K4434755J6)
- [Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/scholar?q=Vanessa+Di+Lego)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/vdilego)
- [Cedeplar faculty page](https://cedeplar.ufmg.br/pos-graduacao/demografia#professores-e-pesquisadores)

::: {style="font-size:0.8rem;color:#888;margin-top:2rem;border-top:1px solid #f0f0f0;padding-top:1rem;"}
*To update the PDF CV, replace `cv.pdf` in the root of the repository.*
:::
